title: tribolium ciliare
intro: Tribolium ciliare, also known as the 'hairy tribolium', is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, typically found in the Mediterranean region. Tribolium ciliare is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, colds, and respiratory infections, offering health benefits such as improved digestion and relief from respiratory issues. Tribolium ciliare can be prepared as a tea or infusion for herbal remedies, or dried and used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal properties.
